remarks: Best & Final deadline: Tuesday, July 7th at 9am in consideration of the holiday weekend****THERE ARE CONDOS... and then there's The Chesterfield-one of Stamford's most distinctive gated communities. This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-full-bath townhouse with loft is your opportunity to be part of it! The dramatic great room features soaring ceilings, hardwood floors throughout the living room, dining area and kitchen, plus a skylight that fills the space with natural light. The kitchen offers abundant cabinetry, a breakfast bar, and a new butcher block countertop. The main-level bedroom suite features a 6'x5' walk-in closet, ceiling fan, private balcony, and direct access to the full bath. Upstairs, the spacious 14'x14' loft with skylight and three closets offers endless possibilities for a home office, den, or guest space. The primary suite features a vaulted ceiling, walk-in closet, and an oversized bath with double vanity, soaking tub, and separate shower. Additional highlights include central air, attached garage parking plus a second assigned outdoor space, and a private storage closet. Community amenities include two pools, a clubhouse, visitor parking, and a gated entrance with guard booth. Just across the street from Ridgeway Shopping Center, you'll enjoy easy access to Stop & Shop, restaurants, shopping, and everyday conveniences. Pet-friendly community. With 6 closets, 2 skylights, 4 ceiling fans, and an exceptional location, this home truly has it all.
